record.text:
left: convergence as capacity becoming itself. right: the cobweb after the loop runs — the operation re-imagined by itself.

model: flux-schnell → flux-redux-dev

images.alt: cobweb-eigen-1: concentric amber rings spiraling inward, thick at edges, thin at center, on black
cobweb-closure-redux: the cobweb re-imagined by the operation — geometric form folding back on itself, amber and black
